description: Trajectoires long-terme : cardio capacity (VO2max, race predictions, fitness age, scores), zones recalibration (FCmax/LTHR/FTP boundaries), body composition (poids). Use case : review mensuel / fin de cycle pour valider l effet du plan.

panels.title: Hill Score (overall)
panels.description:
Numeric rating of your ability to run uphill, based on VO2 Max and training history.

Tiers: Recreational (1-24) | Challenger (25-49) | Trained (50-69) | Skilled (70-84) | Expert (85-94) | Elite (95-100).

Factors: Hill Endurance (sustain pace uphill, elevation gain + time on hills at low intensity), Hill Strength (maintain running power on hills, higher-intensity efforts), VO2 Max (peak oxygen consumption, predictor of uphill ability).

targets.query: SELECT last("weight") / 1000 AS "kg" FROM "BodyComposition" WHERE $timeFilter

panels.title: HRmax (Running)
panels.description: Max HR used by Garmin for running zone calculation. Recalibrated after max HR test.

targets.query: SELECT last("maxHeartRate") FROM "HRZones" WHERE "sport"='RUNNING' AND $timeFilter

panels.title: LTHR (Running)
panels.description: Lactate Threshold HR used by Garmin. Recalibrated after 30-min threshold test or auto-detection during efforts.

targets.query: SELECT last("lactateThresholdHeartRate") FROM "HRZones" WHERE "sport"='RUNNING' AND $timeFilter

panels.title: Resting HR
panels.description: Resting HR used to compute HRR (Heart Rate Reserve). Auto-updated by Garmin (sleep average).

targets.query: SELECT last("restingHeartRate") FROM "HRZones" WHERE "sport"='RUNNING' AND $timeFilter

panels.title: FTP Power (Running)
panels.description: Functional Threshold Power (running). Auto-FTP computed by the watch from efforts.

targets.query: SELECT last("functionalThresholdPower") FROM "PowerZones" WHERE "sport"='RUNNING' AND $timeFilter

panels.title: Delta vs 30d
panels.description: Change from ~30 days ago.

targets.query: SELECT (last("weight") - first("weight")) / 1000 AS "delta" FROM "BodyComposition" WHERE time > now() - 30d

panels.title: VO2max
panels.description:
VO2max running, ranked by percentile tiers:
Iron <28 (bottom 3%) | Bronze 28-37 (3-20%) | Silver 37-42 (20-42%) | Gold 42-47 (42-67%) | Platinum 47-53 (67-85%) | Emerald 53-60 (85-95%) | Diamond 60-68 (95-99.2%) | Master 68-75 (99.2-99.9%) | Grandmaster 75-80 (99.9-99.98%) | Challenger >=80 (top 0.02%).

panels.title: Hill Score — Overall
panels.description:
Numeric rating of your ability to run uphill, based on VO2 Max and training history.

Tiers: Recreational (1-24) | Challenger (25-49) | Trained (50-69) | Skilled (70-84) | Expert (85-94) | Elite (95-100).

Factors: Hill Endurance (sustain pace uphill, elevation gain + time on hills at low intensity), Hill Strength (maintain running power on hills, higher-intensity efforts), VO2 Max (peak oxygen consumption, predictor of uphill ability).

panels.title: Hill Score — Strength
panels.description: Hill Strength measures your ability to maintain running power on hills. Based on higher-intensity hill efforts.

panels.title: Hill Score — Endurance
panels.description: Hill Endurance measures how well you can sustain pace and performance when running uphill. Based on elevation gain and time spent on hills with low intensity.

panels.title: Race Prediction — 5K

targets.query: SELECT mean("time5K") / 5 AS "Pace /km" FROM "RacePredictions" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.description: Garmin Race Prediction 5K. Tiers based on Daniels VDOT table.

panels.title: Race Prediction — 10K

targets.query: SELECT mean("time10K") / 10 AS "Pace /km" FROM "RacePredictions" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.description: Garmin Race Prediction 10K. Tiers based on Daniels VDOT table.

panels.title: Race Prediction — Half Marathon

targets.query: SELECT mean("timeHalfMarathon") / 21.0975 AS "Pace /km" FROM "RacePredictions" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.description: Garmin Race Prediction Half Marathon. Tiers based on Daniels VDOT table.

panels.title: Race Prediction — Full Marathon

targets.query: SELECT mean("timeMarathon") / 42.195 AS "Pace /km" FROM "RacePredictions" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.description: Garmin Race Prediction Marathon. Tiers based on Daniels VDOT table.

panels.title: HR Zone Boundaries — Trajectory
panels.description: Z1-Z5 floor + LTHR + HRmax evolution over time. Zone recalibrations by Garmin appear as steps.

targets.query: SELECT last("zone1Floor") AS "Z1", last("zone2Floor") AS "Z2", last("zone3Floor") AS "Z3", last("zone4Floor") AS "Z4", last("zone5Floor") AS "Z5", last("lactateThresholdHeartRate") AS "LTHR", last("maxHeartRate") AS "FCmax" FROM "HRZones" WHERE "sport"='RUNNING' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(previous)

panels.title: Power Zone Boundaries — Trajectory
panels.description: Z1-Z5 floor + FTP evolution. Garmin auto-FTP drives zone scale. Good plan progression = FTP rising over time.

targets.query: SELECT last("zone1Floor") AS "Z1", last("zone2Floor") AS "Z2", last("zone3Floor") AS "Z3", last("zone4Floor") AS "Z4", last("zone5Floor") AS "Z5", last("functionalThresholdPower") AS "FTP" FROM "PowerZones" WHERE "sport"='RUNNING' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(previous)

panels.title: LTHR as % of HRmax
panels.description:
LTHR as % of HRmax over time. Key marker of lactate threshold fitness.

DASHED LINES (population benchmarks)
• < 82%: beginner
• 82-87%: recreational
• 87-92%: well-trained
• 92-95%: elite endurance
• > 95%: world-class

Hover for LTHR (bpm), threshold pace, and HRmax used.

targets.query: SELECT mean("pct_fcmax") AS "% HRmax" FROM "ThresholdComputed" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null) tz('Europe/Paris')
SELECT mean("lthr_bpm") AS "LTHR (bpm)" FROM "ThresholdComputed" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null) tz('Europe/Paris')
SELECT mean("pace_per_km_sec") AS "Threshold Pace" FROM "ThresholdComputed" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null) tz('Europe/Paris')
SELECT mean("fcmax_used") AS "HRmax (bpm)" FROM "ThresholdComputed" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null) tz('Europe/Paris')
SELECT mean("weight") / 1000 AS "kg" FROM "BodyComposition" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: Cardiac Efficiency (Power/HR) — 14d avg
panels.description: Ratio mean(Power) / mean(HR) per day (running, Power>100W and HR>130bpm to exclude warmup/cooldown). Rising ratio = more watts per bpm. Ascending trend over 90d = successful aerobic adaptation.

targets.query: SELECT mean("Power") / mean("HeartRate") AS "W/bpm" FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE $timeFilter AND "ActivitySelector" =~ /running/ AND "Power" > 100 AND "HeartRate" > 130 GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: Eddington — Running (Lifetime)

targets.query: SELECT "distance" FROM "ActivitySummary" WHERE "ActivitySelector" =~ /running/ AND "distance" > 1000 AND time > '2010-01-01T00:00:00Z' LIMIT 10000

panels.description:
Eddington number: how many runs of >= N km for each N.

Blue bars = count of runs >= N km. Grey dashed line = y=x threshold. The Eddington E = last bar exceeding the diagonal. At N=E+1, the gap between diagonal and bar = runs needed to level up.

Source: all running activities (lifetime, distance >= 1 km). Histogram bucketSize=1, cumulative sum descending, filtered N >= 10.
Heat acclimation percentage from Garmin. >75% = well acclimated. Seasonal pattern expected.
panels.title: Heat Acclimation

panels.description: Altitude acclimation from Garmin. Shows the altitude (in meters) you are fully adapted to. Tracking activates above 800m. Range: 800-4000m.
panels.title: Altitude Acclimation
Efficiency Factor (GAP/HR) — 7d avg
panels.description:
TrainingPeaks canonical Efficiency Factor: mean(GradeAdjustedSpeed) / mean(HR) x 100.

METHOD
• GradeAdjustedSpeed (Garmin GAP/NGP) normalizes for terrain grade
• mean(GAP) / mean(HR), not mean(GAP/HR) — per TrainingPeaks spec
• First 10 min excluded (HR stabilization per Friel)
• Speed > 0.5 m/s (exclude stops)
• No HR zone filter — full workout EF, compare similar session types

HOW TO READ
• Higher = faster at lower cardiac cost = better aerobic fitness
• Rising trend over 4-8 weeks = confirmed aerobic adaptation
• Compare across similar workouts (e.g. easy runs to easy runs)
• Orange line = 7-day moving average

Ref: TrainingPeaks EF, Joe Friel (2009), Coggan/Allen power-based training.

targets.query: SELECT mean("GradeAdjustedSpeed") * 100.0 / mean("HeartRate") AS "EF" FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE $timeFilter AND "ActivitySelector" =~ /running/ AND "DurationSeconds" >= 600 AND "Speed" > 0.5 GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

SELECT moving_average("EF", 7) AS "EF_ma7" FROM (SELECT mean("GradeAdjustedSpeed") * 100.0 / mean("HeartRate") AS "EF" FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE $timeFilter AND "ActivitySelector" =~ /running/ AND "DurationSeconds" >= 600 AND "Speed" > 0.5 GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null))

panels.title: Activity Conditions
panels.description:
Temperature and WBGT per activity. Cross-reference with EF: rising temp = expect lower EF.
WBGT thresholds: <18 low risk, 18-23 moderate, 23-28 high, >28 extreme.
Optimal running: 7-15C.

targets.query: SELECT "temperature_c" FROM "ActivityWeather" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT "wbgt_estimated" FROM "ActivityWeather" WHERE $timeFilter

title: 08 Long-Term Trends
